name: Get Asset
description: Read asset metadata from any resolvable address (a/<hash>, o/<name>, v/ops/..., DID URL). Returns {id, exists, value}. Use asset_content for the binary payload, or covia_read if you just want the raw value without asset semantics.

id.description: Asset reference. Any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).

exists.description: True if a metadata map was found at the address

value.description: The resolved metadata object (present when exists is true)
